creator: martin@sugioarto.com
text:
Oh yes, I tried now and it worked, but still choking at 2 MB for a long time. I wonder why the snapshot is 73 MB and the source package 2,8 MB and why the snapshot downloads A LOT QUICKER. I originally have tried to download from this source, too, but I've had all this download errors and tried the snapshot.

After these initial download problems it installs fine for me and seems to work OK.
